entry.title: was it you, midst the fire and the embers?
entry.summary:
Author: theleftoveryou

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,190Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 23

Summary: This is not how things were supposed to go, and he is not supposed to be here alone, and he is not supposed to mind being alone, only he does, and it’s all Merlin’s fault. Merlin, who has worked his way past all of Arthur’s defenses, into his life and into his heart. That, he supposes, is what sorcerers do. ---------- A confession of magic. And, perhaps, a confession of something else.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Don’t Follow Me (I Can’t Bear to Look)
entry.summary:
Author: Gwenifara_Fae

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,830Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 13

Summary: Arthur asks Gwen to marry him and Merlin decides he can’t bear to watch his best friend marry the love of his life and leaves.After reading Merlin’s note, Arthur mistakenly believes Merlin is in love with Gwen and must decide between chasing after the best friend he’s ever had, and potentially loosing his fiancé.Morgana’s snide comments are helping no one. Gwaine won’t leave Merlin alone.

entry.title: now promise you'll be good
entry.summary:
Author: urmomsboyfriend

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 31,477Chapters: 2/3Kudos: 204

Summary: Merlin hums, making Arthur look back at him and Gods—Arthur already knows what he’s going to say even before his plush lips can grace the shape of the syllables. And yet, it hits him all the same, the gut punch of words delivered by a man whose praise seems worth its weight in gold. Merlin leans in closer, breath almost ghosting along Arthur’s skin as the binds come undone. “Good boy.” . All the times Merlin calls Arthur a good boy and the times Arthur seeks it out, then what happens when the praise stops.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.summary:

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,363Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 11

entry.title: Among The Wildflowers
entry.summary:
Author: YellingAtPlants

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,874Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 86

Summary: Part three of the Where the Quiet Things Grow saga·༻𐫱༺·Post Not All Dragons and Dandelions, a direct continuation of Beneath the Roses (though can be read without reading either)·༻𐫱༺· After a disastrous confrontation with his father, Arthur Pendragon finds himself on the run with his soulmate. He learns that really, he knew absolutely nothing before Merlin came into his life, everyone he thought were his enemies are friends, his friends are all cruel people (one more princess joke Gwaine... see what happens) and his sister is a meddling witch. No, really. Oh, and apparently his soulmate is a god. ·༻𐫱༺· A story of subterfuge, humour, falling in love, overthrowing a tyrant king and cheese that tastes like apple pies... or something like that.

entry.title: Reflections
entry.summary:
Author: Margo_LemonyCat

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,302Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 11

Summary: He could never quite name the color. It wasn't a simple water blue; it was far too dark. But it wasn't a typical cobalt shade either. The closest comparison he could find were forest berries glistening with dew. And now he saw that beautiful shade, veiled by a treacherous gold. ___ One-shot about Merthur's worries. Nothing more, nothing less.

entry.title: I Wanna Get Lovesick With You
entry.summary:
Author: Chaosbat7

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,737Chapters: 10/10Kudos: 41

Summary: After his father died, Arthur Pendragon started a new job at a local coffee shop, having never been satisfied with his boring office job. Everything was going well for Arthur, and he was falling into a routine with this job. But routines do like to be broken. When Merlin Emrys enters Arthur's coffee shop, his young daughter in tow, Arthur's life is turned upside down.

entry.title: [Podfic] And like the cycle of the year, we begin again
entry.summary:
Author: Amanita_Fierce

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 532Chapters: 11/39Kudos: 146

Summary: Set after the Merlin Series 5 Finale "Diamond of the Day".Canon Compliant. In Character. Arthur Pendragon Returns.------For many long years Merlin waited.For the other part of his soul, for the other half of his life. He was born to serve Arthur. So that meant he was also born to wait. Even if it took a thousand years. Even if the wait seemed never to end.Until one day, suddenly, it did.When Arthur stumbles from the Lake of Avalon 1,500 years after his death, he finds a world unlike the one he knew. Faced with the loss of everyone he loved, and the threat of impending prophecy, Arthur must learn what it means to be not just a king, but the Once and Future King. Merlin does all he can to guide him, even as he struggles to hide his love for his king, and his fear of losing him again.Story includes sass, banter, horseplay, & True Love.

entry.title: [Art] What the Ruins Revealed
entry.summary:
Author: Shadow_Hole

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 14

Summary: The great and ancient city of Camelot had been lost to time. Some believe it had never existed in the first place, while others speculated and theorized on just where it was and what had happened to it.In the 21st century, it is found, and sends waves through the modern world.An archaeologist and his field techs uncover the site, and discover the great relics that lay within.A scholar rethinks her entire body of research.An online theorist rethinks his entire life.And a children’s author reminisces on centuries gone past. Or, a look at the discovery of the lost city of Camelot, through multiple modern POVs!   Art for BBC Merlin RVBB 2025-2026.

entry.title: The Ghost of You
entry.summary:
Author: bad_peppermint

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,184Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 22

Summary: “How?” Mordred had stuttered, some time later, when they were out of Arthur’s ex’s house and back in the small two-bedroom flat Arthur rented nowadays, black nail polish-adorned hands trembling around the meet&greet tickets. “These sold out in like, less than twenty seconds. H-how?”“I have my connections,” Arthur had said, mysteriously, and Mordred had rolled his eyes and let it go. Or; Arthur takes his teenage son to another concert. This time, he has ulterior motives.

entry.title: How Fatherhood Changes a Man (and Certain Policies of State)
entry.summary:
Author: mayoInYourWalls

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 65,941Chapters: 13/20Kudos: 51

Summary: Most everyone Merlin knew warned him that nothing good would ever come of his little (though astonishingly requited) crush on the Lady Morgana. Merlin was, as of now, finding himself in agreement, as she made her dramatic return to Camelot one year after Merlin had attempted to kill her with hemlock. But when Merlin discovers the child, his child, he can say at least one very good thing, as well many more exceedingly ridiculous and complicated things, certainly had come of it. Featuring pervasive passive aggression and a general sense of melancholy, an extended and distinctly non peaceful political process to legalising magic, a not entirely willing family trip to Ealdor, and some foreign diplomatic negotiations somewhat lacking in diplomacy.

entry.title: A Curse or a Revelation (Probably a Curse)
entry.summary:
Author: I_shouldnt_be_given_this_power

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,746Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 1

Summary: The King of Camelot, his Knights of the Round Table and Merlin have had peace and quiet for far too long after the defeat of Morgana and Mordred and everyone became friends n shit (cos I fucking said so). A quiet quest to a small village with problems of the magical kind goes awry when Arthur is cursed. By what, they don't know, but they'll do their best to protect him on their trek home.Essentialy, Arthur's a damsel in distress.(no one died, I know I'm weak, I can't handle it)

entry.title: Blood, Sweat and Tears
entry.summary:
Author: Marshmellow0v0

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,736Chapters: 7/15Kudos: 61

Summary: Merlin disappears in the middle of the night, leaving behind nothing but a scream heard by a nearby servant, a smear of blood, and a castle full of unanswered questions. Arthur is convinced it’s just Merlin being Merlin, until the hours stretch on, the clues grow stranger, and the fear in Camelot becomes impossible to ignore. Arthur goes off on a journey to find the missing Merlin, to bring him home, back to Camelot. But that’s harder than Arthur could have ever imagined.

  • Other Additional Tags to Be Added

entry.title: Waterfall
entry.summary:
Author: FallingLeaf1298

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,151Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 9

Summary: They found it there, in the woods. It was able to change destiny and fate itself. The interwoven golden strands becoming a more complicated web from the moment that they found it.

entry.title: What We Were, What We Will Always Be
entry.summary:
Author: MakingMyOwnReality

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,661Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 412

Summary: Crimson flags and crimson blood, Arthur Pendragon had died on the shores of Avalon, in the arms of his other half.A millenia passes and Merlin walks the Earth, changed yes, but hope still clings with ragged talons to what is left of his heart. Then, he trips onto a girl named Harry Potter and suddenly, he can breathe again.Or, the story of how two soulmates gain a second chance at life and build Albion while defeating Dark Lords on their way to Ben & Jerry's.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Merlin (Merlin)/Harry Potter
  • Lucius Malfoy/Narcissa Black Malfoy
